To: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/21053: new port audio/spiralsynth

Whoops!  I notice that patches/patch-ab is spurious.  It should be
omitted, with patch-ac and patch-ad renamed to patch-ab and patch-ac.
-- 
Trevor Johnson

----- End forwarded message -----
